requirement_topic.en: EMC — RED Art. 3.1(b) + EN 301 489 Series (Croatia / HAKOM)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — RED第3.1(b)条 + EN 301 489系列（克罗地亚 / HAKOM）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — RED第3.1(b)條 + EN 301 489系列（克羅埃西亞 / HAKOM）

summary.en: Croatia applies EU harmonised EMC requirements without national derogation. Radio equipment must protect the radio spectrum and ensure adequate immunity under RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b). For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, the applicable harmonised standards are EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (common technical requirements) and EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (specific conditions for RLAN / Bluetooth broadband data transmission systems). These standards reference CISPR 32 emission limits and IEC 61000-4 immunity levels. HAKOM is the national authority enforcing RED EMC requirements in Croatia; it can request test reports and DoC documentation from importers or EU Authorised Representatives at any time.
summary.zh: 克罗地亚适用欧盟协调电磁兼容要求，无国家豁免。依据RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)条，无线电设备须保护无线电频谱并确保充分的抗扰度。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，适用的协调标准为EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3（通用技术要求）和EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（RLAN/蓝牙宽带数据传输系统特定条件）。上述标准参考CISPR 32发射限值和IEC 61000-4抗扰度等级。HAKOM是克罗地亚执行RED电磁兼容要求的国家机构，可随时向进口商或欧盟授权代表要求提供检测报告和合格声明文件。
summary.zht: 克羅埃西亞適用歐盟協調電磁相容要求，無國家豁免。依據RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)條，無線電設備須保護無線電頻譜並確保充分的抗擾度。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，適用的協調標準為EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3（通用技術要求）和EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（RLAN/藍牙寬頻數據傳輸系統特定條件）。上述標準參考CISPR 32發射限值和IEC 61000-4抗擾度等級。HAKOM是克羅埃西亞執行RED電磁相容要求的國家機構，可隨時向進口商或歐盟授權代表要求提供檢測報告和合格聲明文件。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(b) — as transposed in Croatia
EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 — Electromagnetic compatibility and radio spectrum matters; common technical requirements
EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 — Specific conditions for broadband data transmission systems (RLAN / Bluetooth)

summary.en: Chinese EMC requirements for wireless devices are covered by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, equivalent to CISPR 32:2015) and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity, equivalent to CISPR 24:2010), administered by SAMR/SAC. CCC-listed products are tested at CNCA-designated laboratories. While the underlying emission limits are broadly aligned with CISPR 32, EN 301 489-17 applies RLAN-specific test modes and duty-cycle-adjusted averaging not present in the Chinese GB/T framework. Chinese test reports are not accepted by HAKOM as evidence of RED EMC conformity.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备的电磁兼容要求涵盖GB/T 9254.1-2021（发射，等同于CISPR 32:2015）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度，等同于CISPR 24:2010），由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会管理。CCC认证产品在CNCA指定实验室检测。尽管基础发射限值与CISPR 32大体一致，EN 301 489-17采用了中国GB/T框架中不存在的RLAN特定测试模式和占空比调整平均方法。HAKOM不接受中国检测报告作为RED电磁兼容符合性的证明。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備的電磁相容要求涵蓋GB/T 9254.1-2021（發射，等同於CISPR 32:2015）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度，等同於CISPR 24:2010），由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會管理。CCC認證產品在CNCA指定實驗室檢測。儘管基礎發射限值與CISPR 32大體一致，EN 301 489-17採用了中國GB/T框架中不存在的RLAN特定測試模式和佔空比調整平均方法。HAKOM不接受中國檢測報告作為RED電磁相容符合性的證明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment; radio disturbance characteristics (emissions, equivalent to CISPR 32:2015) (SAMR/SAC)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment; immunity characteristics (equivalent to CISPR 24:2010) (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Chinese EMC test reports to GB/T 9254.1 / GB/T 17618 cannot substitute for EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 compliance in Croatia. Key gaps: (1) EN 301 489-17 applies RLAN-specific duty-cycle-adjusted emission averaging and dedicated test modes not present in GB/T 9254.1; (2) EU immunity test configurations under EN 301 489-1 reference specific IEC 61000-4 severity levels that may differ from Chinese test setups; (3) HAKOM may request test reports citing the specific harmonised EN version — Chinese GB reports do not meet this evidential standard. Re-testing at an ILAC MRA-member or EU-accredited laboratory to EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 is required. Test reports must be retained for 10 years and made available to HAKOM on request.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254.1 / GB/T 17618电磁兼容检测报告不能替代克罗地亚EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17合规。主要差距：（1）EN 301 489-17采用GB/T 9254.1中不存在的RLAN特定占空比调整发射平均和专用测试模式；（2）EN 301 489-1下欧盟抗扰度测试配置参考特定的IEC 61000-4严酷等级，可能与中国测试设置不同；（3）HAKOM可能要求检测报告引用特定协调EN版本，中国GB报告不满足此证明标准。须在ILAC MRA成员或欧盟认可实验室按EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17重新检测。检测报告须保存10年，并在HAKOM要求时提供。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254.1 / GB/T 17618電磁相容檢測報告不能取代克羅埃西亞EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17合規。主要差距：（1）EN 301 489-17採用GB/T 9254.1中不存在的RLAN特定佔空比調整發射平均和專用測試模式；（2）EN 301 489-1下歐盟抗擾度測試配置參考特定的IEC 61000-4嚴酷等級，可能與中國測試設置不同；（3）HAKOM可能要求檢測報告引用特定協調EN版本，中國GB報告不滿足此證明標準。須在ILAC MRA成員或歐盟認可實驗室按EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17重新檢測。檢測報告須保存10年，並在HAKOM要求時提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b); covered under CE marking; HAKOM enforces in Croatia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed products; GB/T 9254.1 / GB/T 17618 under SAMR/SAC framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.1(b) EMC compliance for Wi-Fi/Bluetooth devices in Croatia requires EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 testing. Chinese GB/T 9254.1 / GB/T 17618 reports are not accepted. HAKOM may request test documentation at any time. EU-accredited laboratory re-testing is required, and reports must be referenced in the DoC and retained for 10 years.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 克罗地亚Wi-Fi/蓝牙设备的RED第3.1(b)条电磁兼容合规要求EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17检测。中国GB/T 9254.1 / GB/T 17618报告不被接受。HAKOM可随时要求提供检测文件。须在欧盟认可实验室重新检测，报告须在合格声明中引用并保存10年。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 克羅埃西亞Wi-Fi/藍牙設備的RED第3.1(b)條電磁相容合規要求EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17檢測。中國GB/T 9254.1 / GB/T 17618報告不被接受。HAKOM可隨時要求提供檢測文件。須在歐盟認可實驗室重新檢測，報告須在合格聲明中引用並保存10年。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU — Applicability to Non-Radio EEE in Croatia
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容指令 2014/30/EU — 适用于克罗地亚非无线电电气电子设备
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容指令 2014/30/EU — 適用於克羅埃西亞非無線電電氣電子設備

summary.en: For electrical or electronic products that are not radio equipment (i.e., do not contain a radio transmitter or receiver), Croatia applies the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (transposed as EMCD) rather than RED. However, for the wireless/IoT device category covered by this dataset, RED 2014/53/EU is the primary applicable directive and its Art. 3.1(b) EMC essential requirement subsumes EMCD for in-scope radio equipment. Products that combine radio and non-radio functions (e.g., a smart home hub with both Wi-Fi and a wired Ethernet port) are assessed under RED for the radio elements; the non-radio elements may also need EMCD compliance if sold separately as standalone non-radio EEE. HAKOM enforces both RED and EMCD for relevant equipment in Croatia.
summary.zh: 对于非无线电设备（即不含无线电发射器或接收器）的电气或电子产品，克罗地亚适用电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU（转化为国内EMCD），而非RED。但对于本数据集涵盖的无线/物联网设备类别，RED 2014/53/EU为主要适用指令，其第3.1(b)条电磁兼容基本要求对于范围内的无线电设备取代EMCD。若产品同时具备无线和非无线功能（如同时具有Wi-Fi和有线以太网口的智能家居集线器），无线部分依据RED进行评估；若非无线部分作为独立非无线EEE单独销售，可能还须满足EMCD合规要求。HAKOM在克罗地亚同时执行相关设备的RED和EMCD。
summary.zht: 對於非無線電設備（即不含無線電發射器或接收器）的電氣或電子產品，克羅埃西亞適用電磁相容指令2014/30/EU（轉化為國內EMCD），而非RED。但對於本數據集涵蓋的無線/物聯網設備類別，RED 2014/53/EU為主要適用指令，其第3.1(b)條電磁相容基本要求對於範圍內的無線電設備取代EMCD。若產品同時具備無線和非無線功能（如同時具有Wi-Fi和有線以太網口的智慧家居集線器），無線部分依據RED進行評估；若非無線部分作為獨立非無線EEE單獨銷售，可能還須滿足EMCD合規要求。HAKOM在克羅埃西亞同時執行相關設備的RED和EMCD。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/30/EU (EMCD) — Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive; applies to EEE not covered by RED
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(b) — subsumes EMCD for radio equipment in scope
EN 55032:2015+A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment; emission requirements (harmonised under EMCD)

summary.en: China does not distinguish between radio and non-radio EMC frameworks in the same manner as the EU. GB/T 9254.1-2021 covers emissions for information technology equipment generally. The CCC mandatory certification scope under CNCA-C17-01 covers both radio-enabled and wired IT equipment under the same EMC standard framework. There is no Chinese regulatory analogue to the EU distinction between RED Art. 3.1(b) and the standalone EMCD for IT/AV equipment.
summary.zh: 中国不像欧盟那样区分无线电和非无线电电磁兼容框架。GB/T 9254.1-2021总体覆盖信息技术设备的发射要求。CNCA-C17-01下的CCC强制认证范围在同一电磁兼容标准框架下涵盖支持无线和有线的IT设备。对于IT/AV设备，中国没有与欧盟RED第3.1(b)条和独立EMCD区分相对应的监管类比。
summary.zht: 中國不像歐盟那樣區分無線電和非無線電電磁相容框架。GB/T 9254.1-2021總體覆蓋信息技術設備的發射要求。CNCA-C17-01下的CCC強制認證範圍在同一電磁相容標準框架下涵蓋支持無線和有線的IT設備。對於IT/AV設備，中國沒有與歐盟RED第3.1(b)條和獨立EMCD區分相對應的監管類比。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment; radio disturbance characteristics (SAMR/SAC)
CCC CNCA-C17-01 — China Compulsory Certification for information technology equipment (SAMR/CNCA)

gap.en: For wireless/IoT products exported from China to Croatia, RED Art. 3.1(b) is the primary EMC gate and the relevant EN 301 489 series standards must be applied. If the product also contains non-radio EEE functionality sold standalone or the product is borderline for RED scope, EMCD EN 55032 compliance may additionally be needed. Manufacturers should confirm product scope under RED Article 1 before selecting the conformity assessment route. HAKOM enforces both RED and EMCD; incorrect directive selection is a common compliance deficiency found in market surveillance.
gap.zh: 对于从中国出口到克罗地亚的无线/物联网产品，RED第3.1(b)条是主要的电磁兼容门槛，须适用相关的EN 301 489系列标准。若产品还包含单独销售的非无线EEE功能，或产品处于RED范围边界，则可能还需满足EMCD EN 55032合规要求。制造商在选择合格评定路径前，应依据RED第1条确认产品范围。HAKOM同时执行RED和EMCD；不正确的指令选择是市场监督中常见的合规缺陷。
gap.zht: 對於從中國出口到克羅埃西亞的無線/物聯網產品，RED第3.1(b)條是主要的電磁相容門檻，須適用相關的EN 301 489系列標準。若產品還包含單獨銷售的非無線EEE功能，或產品處於RED範圍邊界，則可能還需滿足EMCD EN 55032合規要求。製造商在選擇合格評定路徑前，應依據RED第1條確認產品範圍。HAKOM同時執行RED和EMCD；不正確的指令選擇是市場監督中常見的合規缺陷。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMCD 2014/30/EU for non-radio EEE; RED Art. 3.1(b) for radio equipment (primary pathway for wireless/IoT devices); both enforced by HAKOM in Croatia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254.1 under CCC (CNCA-C17-01) for IT equipment EMC; no RED/EMCD distinction

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For wireless/IoT devices exported to Croatia, RED Art. 3.1(b) and EN 301 489 series are the mandatory EMC pathway; EMCD 2014/30/EU applies to any non-radio EEE component sold separately. Incorrect directive selection is a recognised market-surveillance risk in Croatia. Chinese GB/T EMC reports satisfy neither pathway. Manufacturers must confirm scope under RED Art. 1 and apply the correct harmonised standards.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于出口到克罗地亚的无线/物联网设备，RED第3.1(b)条和EN 301 489系列是强制电磁兼容路径；EMCD 2014/30/EU适用于单独销售的非无线EEE组件。不正确的指令选择是克罗地亚市场监督中公认的合规风险。中国GB/T电磁兼容报告不满足任一路径要求。制造商须依据RED第1条确认范围并适用正确的协调标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於出口到克羅埃西亞的無線/物聯網設備，RED第3.1(b)條和EN 301 489系列是強制電磁相容路徑；EMCD 2014/30/EU適用於單獨銷售的非無線EEE組件。不正確的指令選擇是克羅埃西亞市場監督中公認的合規風險。中國GB/T電磁相容報告不滿足任一路徑要求。製造商須依據RED第1條確認範圍並適用正確的協調標準。
